pi_items.source: Task configuration verified against environment setup scripts and other task examples which consistently use this directory path for OpenBCI GUI screenshots.

Official OpenBCI GUI Widget Guide documentation at https://docs.openbci.com/Software/OpenBCISoftware/GUIWidgets/ confirms 'FFT Plot' as the official widget name. Verified in task evidence_docs/add_fft_widget.png showing the widget in OpenBCI GUI interface.

Official OpenBCI GUI Widget Guide documentation at https://docs.openbci.com/Software/OpenBCISoftware/GUIWidgets/ confirms 'Head Plot' as the official widget name. Verified in related task 'configure_head_plot_widget' which lists 'Head Plot' in required_widgets, and in evidence_docs/add_fft_widget.png screenshot showing Head Plot widget.

privileged_info_summary: The OpenBCI GUI is a real, documented application with official FFT Plot and Head Plot widgets confirmed in the OpenBCI Widget Guide. The task uses synthetically-generated EEG data (not real patient data), as specified in the task description: 'Start a synthetic session in OpenBCI GUI' and confirmed by the instruction to select 'SYNTHETIC (algorithmic)' as the data source. The expected screenshot path /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/head_plot_layout.png follows the standard directory structure used across all OpenBCI GUI tasks in this environment.
